key_finding: CHALLENGE: Problem-number residualization. METHODOLOGICAL CORRECTION: exp_078 V→final|local R=0.520 inflated by within-problem data leakage (true GroupKFold R=0.299). With proper GroupKFold: V→final R=0.487 > embed→final R=0.344, V→final|embed R=0.14-0.22 (survives context control), V→final|embed+local R=0.13-0.22 (survives strictest control). Effect MODERATE (R≈0.2), not STRONG (R≈0.5). V carries genuine forward-looking computation but effect smaller than previously claimed.
evidence_impact: MODERATE evidence. Challenge PARTIALLY SURVIVED: V's forward-looking signal is real but weaker than exp_078 claimed (R≈0.2 vs R≈0.5). Key methodological lesson: operation-level probing with KFold suffers within-problem data leakage — must use GroupKFold. Exp_078 partial R revised from 0.520 to 0.299.
next_planned: GroupKFold bootstrap significance test; cross-model replication with GroupKFold on Mistral; non-GSM8K task where answer isn't predictable from problem numbers.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: MODERATE (revised down from STRONG): V→final|embed R=0.14-0.22 with GroupKFold (exp_079 challenge). V carries computation beyond problem context but effect is MODERATE, not strong. Exp_078 partial R=0.520 was inflated to 0.299 by data leakage. WRRA 71.4% (p=0.039, n=21) unaffected. CumV>cumText replicated on 2 models (exp_076-077) — not yet retested with GroupKFold.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: cumV > cumText replicated on 2 families. Forward-looking probing on Qwen only (needs GroupKFold replication on Mistral).
